module asyn_fifo #(
    parameter	WIDTH = 8,
    parameter 	DEPTH = 16,
    parameter ADDR_WIDTH = $clog2(DEPTH)
) (
    input 					wclk,
    input 					rclk,
    input 					wrstn,
    input					rrstn,
    input 					winc,
    input 			 		rinc,
    input 		[WIDTH-1:0]	wdata,
    output wire				wfull,
    output wire				rempty,
    output reg [WIDTH-1:0]	rdata
);
parameter
parameter
parameter
input
input
input
input
input
input
input
output

input
input
input
input
input
input
input

reg

endmodule

module dual_port_RAM #(parameter DEPTH = 16,  parameter WIDTH = 8)
(
	 input wclk	,
	 input wenc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] waddr  ,
	 input [WIDTH-1:0] wdata ,
	 input rclk	,
	 input renc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] raddr ,
	 output reg [WIDTH-1:0] rdata 		
);

reg [WIDTH-1:0] RAM_MEM [0:DEPTH-1];

always @(posedge wclk) begin
	if(wenc)
		RAM_MEM[waddr] <= wdata;
end 

always @(posedge rclk) begin
	if(renc)
		rdata <= RAM_MEM[raddr];
end 

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Data input for writing.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full flag.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty flag.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Data output for reading.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">Width of each data entry in the FIFO.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">Depth of the FIFO (number of entries).</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        <instance id="ram" module="dual_port_RAM" width="WIDTH" depth="DEPTH">
            <port id="wclk" connection="wclk"/>
            <port id="wenc" connection="wen"/>
            <port id="waddr" connection="waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="wdata" connection="wdata"/>
            <port id="rclk" connection="rclk"/>
            <port id="renc" connection="ren"/>
            <port id="raddr" connection="raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="rdata" connection="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Write pointer management
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width="$clog2(DEPTH)">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn)>
                if (!wrstn) begin
                    waddr_bin <= 0;
                end else if (winc) begin
                    waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
                end
            </always>
        </reg>
        <wire id="wptr" width="4">
            {waddr_bin[3], waddr_bin[3]^waddr_bin[2], waddr_bin[2]^waddr_bin[1], waddr_bin[1]^waddr_bin[0]}
        </wire>
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width="4">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn)>
                if (!wrstn) begin
                    wptr_buff <= 0;
                end else begin
                    wptr_buff <= wptr;
                end
            </always>
        </reg>
        <assign wen = winc && !wfull;>
        <assign waddr = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];>
        
        // Read pointer management
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width="$clog2(DEPTH)">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn)>
                if (!rrstn) begin
                    raddr_bin <= 0;
                end else if (rinc) begin
                    raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
                end
            </always>
        </reg>
        <wire id="rptr" width="4">
            {raddr_bin[3], raddr_bin[3]^raddr_bin[2], raddr_bin[2]^raddr_bin[1], raddr_bin[1]^raddr_bin[0]}
        </wire>
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width="4">
            <initial_value>0</initial_value>
            <always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn)>
                if (!rrstn) begin
                    rptr_buff <= 0;
                end else begin
                    rptr_buff <= rptr;
                end
            </always>
        </reg>
        <assign ren = rinc && !rempty;>
        <assign raddr = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];>
        
        // Full/Empty flags
        <assign wfull = (wptr == {!rptr_buff[3], rptr_buff[3]^rptr_buff[2], rptr_buff[2]^rptr_buff[1], rptr_buff[1]^rptr_buff[0]});>
        <assign rempty = (rptr == wptr);>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Asynchronously manages data flow between a producer and consumer using dual-port RAM and pointer buffers.</implementation>
</module>
